signals.snippet: Hi Lane, I was waiting for you on the scheduled call, but I believe you are busy and unable to get on the call. Please let me know if you will be able to join the call today or would you want to reschedule the meeting?

cause_analysis.narrative: Medical Laser & Aesthetics churned on 2026-04-06 after 143 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 25-day silence starting 2025-12-15. Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-15 via sms. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
